name: log-symbols

metadata.name: log-symbols
metadata.summary: Colored symbols for various log levels for Python

documentation: Colored symbols for various log levels for Python. Find the documentation here: https://github.com/manrajgrover/py-log-symbols.

modules.name: log_symbols.symbols
documentation: Provide log symbols for various log levels.

functions.name: log_symbols.symbols.is_supported
documentation:
Check whether operating system supports main symbols or not.

Returns
-------
boolean
    Whether operating system supports main symbols or not

classes.name: log_symbols.symbols.LogSymbols
documentation:
LogSymbol enum class.

Attributes
----------
ERROR : str
    Colored error symbol
INFO : str
    Colored info symbol
SUCCESS : str
    Colored success symbol
WARNING : str
    Colored warning symbol
